summary: Inventory & categorization of uploaded/modified project files, with detected overlaps and potential conflicts for merge planning.

multiple_entrypoints.description: Several HTML files and multiple JS entry modules provide app boot logic.
multiple_entrypoints.risk: High - duplicate app initialization and differing importmaps/versions may cause runtime conflicts.

duplicate_ui_managers.description: Two UI manager implementations with similar responsibilities exist.
duplicate_ui_managers.risk: Medium - both wire UI and expect DOM elements; may cause null access or duplicated listeners.

objects_manager_variants.description: objects-manager.js vs ObjectsManager usage in different modules.
objects_manager_variants.risk: Low/Medium - name and API are compatible but ensure single canonical import path.

import_export_wrappers.description: Multiple wrappers/implementations exist (import-export-manager.js, ImportExportManager in app(2).js).
import_export_wrappers.risk: Medium - ensure a single facade and that ModelEditor delegates to it to avoid fragmentation.

three_version_mismatch.description: Different HTML importmaps reference differing three.js versions (0.158.0, 0.164.1, 0.164.1 in various files).
three_version_mismatch.risk: High - incompatible APIs across versions can break runtime behavior.

nipplejs_and_physics_loading.description: nipplejs is referenced in InputManager and importmaps; cannon-es referenced in PhysicsSystem and import maps.
nipplejs_and_physics_loading.risk: Medium - must lazy-load or guard when libs not present.

recommendations.canonical_entry: Choose one HTML entry (prefer index (2).html or index.html) and standardize app bootstrap to a single main.js/app.js to avoid duplicate initialization.
recommendations.ui_manager: Merge UIManager implementations into the single safe ui-manager.js pattern with safe-get helpers (already present) and remove duplicate UIManager.js or adapt to be a light wrapper.
recommendations.import_export: Use import-export-manager.js as the single facade and have ModelEditor and app modules delegate to it.
recommendations.three_version: Standardize three.js importmap to one stable version across all HTML entries; update examples/addons imports to match.
recommendations.lazy_load: Load optional heavy libs (cannon-es, nipplejs, draco) lazily and guard initialization when absent.
recommendations.namespaces: Ensure module filenames & exports use consistent casing/paths to avoid duplicate imports (ObjectsManager vs objects-manager.js).
